name: OpenIPAHound 91 Utility - Group Nested Members
description: Expands user/group membership up to three IPA_MemberOf hops for every FreeIPA group. Use this when direct members are not enough and nested group membership may be carrying access.
query:
MATCH p=(member)-[:IPA_MemberOf*1..3]->(group:IPA_Group)
WHERE member:IPA_User OR member:IPA_Group
RETURN p, group.cn AS group_cn, coalesce(member.uid, member.cn, member.principal, member.fqdn) AS member_name
LIMIT 1000
